name: Fudge Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F. Grease a 9-inch square baking pan.
2. Melt butter and chocolate in a small saucepan over low heat. Stir until blended and set aside to cool.
3. Beat eggs until light yellow; add salt, sugar, flour, baking powder, vanilla, and pecans. Beat well until thoroughly combined.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan and bake for 35-45 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool before cutting.
